mission.title: inspektor-gadget: [RFE] Update GadgetInfo() rpc to avoid handling BTF/Wasm client-side
mission.description: [RFE] Update GadgetInfo() rpc to avoid handling BTF/Wasm client-side. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current inspektor-gadget deployment
steps.description:
Verify your inspektor-gadget version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget
helm list -n inspektor-gadget 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working inspektor-gadget installation.

steps.title: Review inspektor-gadget configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant inspektor-gadget configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget
kubectl get configmap -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=inspektor-gadget
```

steps.title: Apply the fix for [RFE] Update GadgetInfo() rpc to avoid handling BTF/Wasm…
steps.description:
# image build: add wasm

This PR adds the possibility to add a wasm module in a gadget image.

There are no changes in the CLI flags. This can be used by adding an entry in `build.yaml`:
```
wasm: program.go
```

The following file types are supported:
* `*.wasm`: pre-compiled wasm module
* `*.go`:
```yaml
type GadgetInfo struct {
	GadgetDefinition *GadgetDefinition
	ProgContent      []byte
}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget
kubectl get events -n inspektor-gadget --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[RFE] Update GadgetInfo() rpc to avoid handling BTF/Wasm…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
# image build: add wasm

This PR adds the possibility to add a wasm module in a gadget image.

There are no changes in the CLI flags. This can be used by adding an entry in `build.yaml`:
```
wasm: program.go
```

The following file types are supported:
* `*.wasm`: pre-compiled wasm module
* `*.go`: Inspektor Gadget will compile it with tinygo

The wasm module is not executed.
codeSnippets:
docker build -f Dockerfiles/ebpf-builder.Dockerfile -t ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/ebpf-builder:alban_wasm2 .
sudo -E ig image build --builder-image=ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/ebpf-builder:alban_wasm2 -t ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/trace_dns:test gadgets/trace_dns/
sudo -E ig run ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/trace_dns:test

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with inspektor-gadget installed or the issue environment reproducible.
